positive: Minimalist, retro-futuristic jungle scene with bioluminescent flora and stylized neon fauna. A central, majestic stylized toucan with oversized, vibrant feather details is perched on a stylized monstera leaf. The background features abstract geometric patterns formed by the root systems and jungle foliage. Color palette focuses on deep sapphire blues, vibrant electric greens, magenta, and glowing yellow accents. Style: Clean vector illustration, linocut etching influence mixed with vaporwave aesthetic. Highly contrasted silhouette, symmetrical composition, optimized for textile print, crisp lines, no gradient noise. Cinematic backlighting casting strong shadows.
negative: blur, noise, grain, signature, watermark, logo, text, messy, dirty, realistic photo, poorly rendered anatomy, bad composition, out of frame, extra limbs, deformed, smudge
